name: Global Lights Acquisition Corp Unit
summary: Global Lights Acquisition Corp Unit consists of one share of common stock and a fraction of a warrant and right to acquire more common stock. It is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on opportunities to acquire businesses and is headquartered in New York.
